narrative:
Circleville-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 424 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points.
